funding.title: Activate Gas Account
funding.freeDesc: Sponsored by Vela for new users
funding.selfDesc: Send {{symbol}} to activate the gas account
funding.denialBalanceTooLow: Wallet balance too low to qualify.

signing.gasEstimateFailed: Couldn't estimate the gas fee — submitting may fail or time out. Tap the fee above to retry.
signing.unlimitedWarning: Unlimited — this contract can spend all your tokens
signing.partialWarning: Incomplete — some details couldn't be decoded. Review carefully before approving.
signing.unverifiedWarning: Token amount couldn't be verified on-chain — double-check it before approving.
signing.blindTypedWarning: This typed data could not be decoded with a known descriptor. Review carefully.
signing.blindDecodeWarning: Unable to decode — no ERC-7730 descriptor ({{bytes}} bytes)
signing.bestEffortWarning: Decoded from the function signature — not a verified descriptor. Review the details carefully.
signing.simWillFail: This transaction is expected to fail — you’d still pay gas.
signing.simWillFailReason: Expected to fail: {{reason}} — you’d still pay gas.

scanner.title: Scan QR
scanner.hint: Point camera at a QR code
scanner.permissionText: Camera access is needed to scan QR codes.
scanner.noQrFoundMsg: Could not find a QR code in the selected image.

chart.tapHint: Tap a bar to see balance

signingApprove.unlimitedDisabled: Unlimited approvals are disabled for your safety
signingApprove.revokeSummary: {{spender}} will no longer be able to spend this token.
signingApprove.choosePrompt: Set a finite amount to continue.
signingApprove.decimalsUnverified: Token decimals couldn’t be verified — double-check the amount.
signingApprove.setApprovalAllWarn: This lets {{operator}} transfer every NFT in this collection. Grant access to a single item instead when you can.
signingApprove.daiWarn: This grants {{spender}} access to your entire balance of this token.
signingApprove.chooseAction: Choose Revoke or Grant to continue.
